headline: A Look At AppLovin (APP) Valuation After Analyst Upgrades And AI Advertising Momentum
summary: A wave of analyst upgrades has put AppLovin (APP) back in focus, as firms respond to stronger mobile game in-app advertising trends, higher first quarter revenue expectations, post earnings strength, partnerships, and sizeable share repurchases. See our latest analysis for AppLovin. Even after a 6.81% 1 day share price gain to US$412.68 and a 10.91% 7 day share price return following upbeat analyst commentary and partnerships, AppLovin’s 30 day and year to date share price returns remain...
